title: OpenAI calls in the consultants for its enterprise push
description: OpenAI is partnering with four consulting giants in an effort to see more adoption of its OpenAI Frontier AI agent platform.

title: Guide Labs debuts a new kind of interpretable LLM
description: The company open-sourced an 8 billion parameter LLM, Steerling-8B, trained with a new architecture designed to make its actions easily interpretable.

title: Particle’s AI news app listens to podcasts for interesting clips so you you don’t have to
description: AI news app Particle can now pull in key moments from podcasts, letting readers instantly play short, relevant clips alongside related stories.

title: Spotify rolls out AI-powered  Prompted Playlists to the U.K. and other markets
description: Spotify continues to test its AI-powered “Prompted Playlists” feature, now rolling out the tool to Premium subscribers in the U.K., Ireland, Australia, and Sweden.

title: VPN flaws allowed Chinese hackers to compromise dozens of Ivanti customers, says report
description: Chinese hackers allegedly broke into the network of an Ivanti subsidiary in 2021. The hackers exploited a backdoor in its VPN product, which allowed the hackers to gain access to 119 other unnamed organizations.

title: How AI agents could destroy the economy
description: Citrini Research imagines a report from two years in the future, in which unemployment has doubled and the total value of the stock market has fallen by more than a third.

title: Defense Secretary summons Anthropic’s Amodei over military use of Claude
description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has summoned Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei to the Pentagon for a tense discussion over the military's use of Claude. Hegseth has threatened to designate Anthropic a "supply chain risk."

title: Wispr Flow launches an Android app for AI-powered dictation
description: The app can support translation in over 100 languages and can work across other apps. Wispr Flow said it has done an infrastructure rewrite that makes dictation 30% faster than before.

title: Can the creator economy stay afloat in a flood of AI slop?
description: On the latest episode of Equity, we debated what’s next for the creator economy, and whether there will be any room for the next generation of creators to stand out.

title: All the important news from the ongoing India AI Impact Summit
description: India is hosting a four-day AI Summit this week that will be attended by executives from major AI labs and Big Tech, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Nvidia, Microsoft, Google, and Cloudflare, as well as heads of state.

title: China’s brain-computer interface industry is racing ahead
description: China’s brain-computer interface industry is rapidly scaling from research to commercialization, driven by strong policy support, expanding clinical trials, and growing investor interest.

title: Apple’s newest AirTags are already on sale if you’re looking to upgrade
Does Big Tech actually care about fighting AI slop?
Hank Green will gladly take billionaire money for education videos
